summary: Lead accepts M4-CAMPAIGN-OBJECTIVES-001 after replacement simulation_engineer implementation, systems_architect REQUEST_CHANGES, R2 deterministic FactionKnowledge fix, and systems_architect R2 ACCEPT. The task adds only the minimal M4 campaign objective/FactionKnowledge substrate, shared player/AI GameCommand paths, and read-only planning/knowledge queries; it does not implement muster, supply consumption, march execution, siege/combat, UI, save-format expansion, full diplomacy, rebellion, or manual battle behavior. The task remains ACCEPTED until PR CI and main integration complete.

tests_run.result: M4-CAMPAIGN-OBJECTIVES-001 ACCEPTED; next dependency-ready candidate M4-MUSTER-PREP-COMMITMENTS-001 appears but remains unstarted until this task enters main and closes

decisions: Accepted optional in-memory state.m4 for M4 campaign objectives; save-format expansion remains out of scope for this task.
Accepted complete deterministic tie-breakers for FactionKnowledge duplicate logical keys.
Accepted shared player/AI GameCommand v1 create/update/cancel paths and read-only planning/knowledge queries.
Kept downstream M4 systems out of scope: muster, supply consumption, march, siege/combat, UI, save/replay persistence, full diplomacy, rebellion, and manual battle.
risks: M4 CampaignPlan and FactionKnowledge state is in-memory only until a later approved M4 save/replay task opens persistence scope.
Downstream M4 tasks must not assume supply, march, siege, combat, or AI planning behavior exists yet.
requested_action: Run lead integration gates, commit accepted state, open PR, require CI, merge to main, close this task, then promote the next dependency-ready M4 task.
